name: Data Universe
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN13 using the official Macrocosmos Data Universe source repository, product site, Gravity docs, Macrocosmos MCP docs, and scraper repository. Stale generated candidates for the old SN13 API docs and sn13-dashboard API host are intentionally not promoted.

surfaces.name: Data Universe website
surfaces.notes: Official Data Universe product website.

surfaces.name: Data Universe source repository
surfaces.notes: Official SN13 Data Universe source repository.

surfaces.name: Gravity docs
surfaces.notes: Macrocosmos Gravity product docs referenced by the Data Universe README.

surfaces.name: Macrocosmos MCP docs
surfaces.notes: Public Macrocosmos MCP docs for SN13 Data Universe data access.

surfaces.name: Macrocosmos scrapers repository
surfaces.notes: Public Macrocosmos scraper repository referenced by the Data Universe project.

surfaces.name: Data Universe Taopedia article
surfaces.notes: Discovered from the public Taopedia article repository. Not protocol authority.

surfaces.name: Data Universe Tensorplex subnet docs
surfaces.notes: Discovered from Tensorplex subnet-docs. Useful as documentation enrichment, not verified operational authority.

surfaces.name: Data Universe TaoMarketCap dashboard
surfaces.notes: Universal TaoMarketCap subnet dashboard candidate. Third-party enrichment, not protocol authority.

surfaces.name: Data Universe on-demand data API (Constellation)
surfaces.notes: SN13 Data Universe real-time on-demand data query (X/Reddit/YouTube) via the Macrocosmos Constellation API (Sn13Service.OnDemandData); requires a Bearer API key (macrocosmos SDK Sn13Client/GravityClient).

surfaces.name: Data Universe dashboard (Hugging Face Space)
surfaces.notes: Official SN13 Data Universe dashboard hosted under the macrocosm-os Hugging Face organization. First-party dashboard complementing the third-party TaoMarketCap surface.

surfaces.name: Macrocosmos TypeScript SDK
surfaces.notes: Official Macrocosmos TypeScript SDK (npm: macrocosmos). Ships the Sn13Client interface to the SN13 Data Universe Validator API; the TypeScript counterpart to the already-listed Python SDK (macrocosmos-py). In the team's macrocosm-os org.

surfaces.name: Data Universe Validator API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1.0 schema (title "Data Universe Validator API", version 1.0.0) served by the SN13 validator API on the macrocosmos-hosted sn13.api.macrocosmos.ai host. Documents the on-demand data-query, bucket, label-size, age-size, and desirability routes. Unauthenticated GET returns the full paths object.

surfaces.name: Data Universe default desirability list
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth JSON default dynamic-desirability list (per-source label weights used to value Reddit and X data) published at dynamic_desirability/default.json in the official macrocosm-os/data-universe repository. Documents the SN13 baseline data-scoring configuration.

auth.name: X-API-Key
auth.scopes_note: Declared as APIKeyHeader (X-API-Key) on every operation in sn13.api.macrocosmos.ai/openapi.json; Macrocosmos Sn13Client/GravityClient credential pattern.

surfaces.name: Data Universe Get Age Sizes
surfaces.notes: Auth-gated GET /api/v1/ages on sn13.api.macrocosmos.ai from the Data Universe Validator API OpenAPI schema (sn-13-data-universe-openapi). All schema operations declare APIKeyHeader (X-API-Key). probe.enabled:false (auth-gated). Live-verified 2026-07-21: anonymous GET /api/v1/health -> HTTP 500 (auth/error anomaly noted in #7029).

surfaces.name: Data Universe API keys
surfaces.notes: Auth-gated GET and POST /api/v1/keys on sn13.api.macrocosmos.ai (list + create) from the Data Universe Validator API OpenAPI schema (sn-13-data-universe-openapi). Same URL hosts both operations; registered once per registry URL uniqueness. All schema operations declare APIKeyHeader (X-API-Key). probe.enabled:false (auth-gated). Live-verified 2026-07-21: anonymous GET /api/v1/health -> HTTP 500 (auth/error anomaly noted in #7029).
